summary: Backend testing of matchesio.com sync feature complete. 13/13 pytest tests passing. Manual sync (replace_all=true & false), admin auth, sync logs, past-events filtering, standard 7 sectors validation, no price_range, regression on /api/events and /api/leagues - all OK. Scheduler started successfully on backend startup ('AsyncIOScheduler avviato cron: 0,6,12,18 UTC').

minor.issue: verify_admin_token uses in-memory active_tokens dict - tokens are lost on backend restart. OK for single-instance preview env, but not multi-worker safe.
Uses synchronous 'requests' library inside async endpoint - blocks the event loop for 30-60s during sync of 13 leagues. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor.
Uses datetime.utcnow() (deprecated) instead of datetime.now(timezone.utc) used elsewhere - minor inconsistency.

action_items: Optional: switch matchesio fetch to async httpx to avoid blocking event loop during long sync (~30-60s).
Optional: persist admin tokens (Mongo/Redis) so they survive restart and work in multi-worker deployments.
Optional: standardize datetime usage to timezone-aware datetime.now(timezone.utc) across routes/events.py.
critical_code_review_comments: matchesio_sync.sync_all_competitions: 'replace_all=True' wipes ALL events including manually created ones - possible footgun. Consider scoping delete_many to {'matchesio_id': {'$exists': True}} so admin-curated events survive.

scheduler runs replace_all=True every 6h - if matchesio.com is down the entire DB gets wiped (deleted_count happens before fetch failure check). Recommend: fetch all 13 JSONs first; abort delete if total fetched < threshold.
routes/sync.py: 'replace_all' default is True which is destructive - safer default would be False (upsert).
admin_auth.verify_admin_token: 'authorization.replace("Bearer ", "")' is fragile (also strips internal occurrences); should use authorization.split(' ',1)[1] when scheme=='bearer'.
events.get_events: when sort_date stored as ISO string, comparison '$gte today_str' (YYYY-MM-DD vs YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS) works lexically but is fragile if sort_date format ever changes.
test_credentials: admin / golevents2024 (from /app/backend/routes/admin_auth.py defaults; /app/memory/test_credentials.md does NOT exist - flag for main agent to create)
seed_data_creation: Sync inserted 353 real events from matchesio.com across 13 competitions (Serie A, Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, Liga Portugal, Super Lig, Champions League, Coppa Italia, Copa del Rey, FA Cup, DFB Pokal, FIFA WC 2026).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_sync_matchesio.py is the regression file for sync feature. Tests run sync twice (~25s total). All 13 tests pass against live matchesio.com. Note: tests depend on matchesio.com availability - if external site is down, tests for sectors/event-presence may skip. Scheduler is running but cron not exercised (every 6h - not testable in short window).
rca of the issue: No bug RCA needed - feature works end-to-end as specified.
